message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "Operational",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Undefined requirements for custom programming.",
      "rationale": "The lack of clearly defined requirements can lead to miscommunication, project delays, and increased costs due to rework.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a detailed requirements gathering process with clear documentation and approval stages before development begins.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "3.2",
      "source_clause_id": "cc0c137b-a56f-47db-b2e9-59ec065485aa",
      "source_excerpt": "The requirements to be fulfilled by the custom programming to the above listed packages are presently undefined.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Commercial",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Payment terms linked to delivery and acceptance testing.",
      "rationale": "The payment structure may incentivize rushed development or inadequate testing, potentially leading to unsatisfactory software performance.",
      "mitigation": "Implement a phased payment structure that includes milestones for both development and testing to ensure quality is prioritized.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.11",
      "source_clause_id": "f5e0cb07-9c1b-481d-9b70-9bed8869e675",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Legal",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Cancellation rights due to failure to deliver.",
      "rationale": "The ability for the Company to cancel the agreement if the Developer fails to deliver on time could lead to significant financial losses for the Developer.",
      "mitigation": "Negotiate terms that provide a reasonable grace period and define acceptable grounds for cancellation to protect both parties.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Enforcement",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Acceptance testing procedures may not be robust.",
      "rationale": "If the acceptance testing procedures are not well-defined, it may lead to disputes over whether the software meets the agreed specifications.",
      "mitigation": "Develop comprehensive acceptance testing criteria and procedures that are agreed upon by both parties before development begins.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.4",
      "source_clause_id": "1abc2f20-335b-461b-a99a-6b1b582d4516",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon approval of the programming specifications, Developer design, in conjunction with Company, an Acceptance test for these specifications.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    }
  ]
}
